title: Process .new-topics.json in worker finalization + update researcher prompt
context: See docs/researcher-topic-creation-design.md. Two changes: (1) In worker finalization (where .work-summary is read), also read .new-topics.json if present. For each entry, check for duplicate title (case-insensitive), create Topic with auto_created=True if new. (2) Update researcher prompt in prompter.py to include topic creation instructions and list existing topic titles for context.
acceptance: 1) Worker finalization reads .new-topics.json from workspace if present. 2) Creates topics with auto_created=True, generated UUID. 3) Case-insensitive duplicate title check — skips existing. 4) Missing/malformed file doesn't crash finalization. 5) Researcher prompt includes topic creation guidance with .new-topics.json format. 6) Researcher prompt includes list of existing topic titles (queried from DB). 7) Tests for topic creation, duplicate skip, missing file, and prompt content.
